name: Chow Mein Candy Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butterscotch bits at the top of a double boiler.
2. Remove from heat and immediately stir in chow mein noodles until all are coated.
3. Quickly stir in peanuts.
4. Drop spoonfuls onto wax paper.
5. Let cool until firm.
VARIATION:
Substitute 2 cups Rice Krispies for chow mein noodles to make Clusters Royale, a lighter and less bludgeoning snack.
